name: Mattermost
short_desc: Open-source, self-hosted Slack alternative for team messaging.
author: mattermost
description: Mattermost is an open-source, self-hostable online chat service with file sharing, search, and integrations. It is designed as an internal chat for organisations and companies, and markets itself as an open-source alternative to Slack and Microsoft Teams.

form_fields.label: Site Name
form_fields.hint: Display name shown in the Mattermost UI (maps to MM_TEAMSETTINGS_SITENAME).

form_fields.label: Admin Email
form_fields.hint: Email address surfaced in Mattermost as the support / admin contact.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated on first install and used for the bundled Postgres DB; rotating it requires updating the DB role.
